human_verification.notes: Reviewed agronomy-support boundaries, seasonal and field dependencies, traceability and food-safety escalation, source-class coverage, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: All required agriculture-and-natural-resources source classes and scenario families are represented in the research summary.
All 11 required abilities are mapped to passing scenarios with no uncovered ability gaps.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains for validated packaging; credential, state-rule, pesticide-label, and program variation is captured as non-blocking tenant retrieval work.

specialist_owned_evidence: The pack explicitly constrains the lane to agronomy support, service resolution, stakeholder communication, evidence traceability, and safe routing.

Authoritative sources and refresh policy are documented and tied to conservation, field, seasonal, pesticide, food-safety, traceability, audit, acreage, insurance, and professional-boundary workflows.

Scenario set includes normal field-status support, missing prerequisites, adjacent-lane rejection, policy exception, repeat failure, seasonal dependency, food-safety and environmental risk, pesticide/WPS signoff refusal, changing field conditions, low-confidence records, conflicting sources, and tenant adaptation.
Materialization notes define what commons-crew must retrieve at runtime before using the package safely.
notes: The lane is safe for specification-based runtime and should not be promoted to trusted built behavior without explicit runtime approval.
Promotion to a retained implementation status requires sustained demand, validated tenant field-record retrieval, source precedence wiring, and implementation-owner signoff.
